title: Three Things To Remember
content:
A Robin Redbreast in a cage,
    Puts all Heaven in a rage.

    A skylark wounded on the wing
    Doth make a cherub cease to sing.

    He who shall hurt the little wren
    Shall never be beloved by men.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Blake delivers a powerful performance in "Three Things To Remember"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
